items.title: [负面] 极度不推荐，这数值尼玛是人填的？严重怀疑制作人没有自己打开过游戏就端上来的。好一个一言难尽的吃屎之旅...
items.summary:
极度不推荐，这数值尼玛是人填的？严重怀疑制作人没有自己打开过游戏就端上来的。好一个一言难尽的吃屎之旅，美工剧情玩法都不错，但最重要的游玩体验就是一坨屎，这导致整个游戏就是一坨装上花瓣的屎。好看但难吃。别打复活赛了，早点埋进土里吧，打赢了也没多少人会认真玩下去。





复活赛打赢了，又来评鉴一下，只能说意料之中。屎游就是屎游，复活赛打赢了身上还是一股熟悉的屎味。策划根本不管数值问题了，意思是你能玩就玩，不能爆米你就别玩了。感觉就是要再圈几年钱然后跑路。

items.title: [正面] This game is a lot of fun and it grabbed me right ...
items.summary:
This game is a lot of fun and it grabbed me right away but after a week I realized my problem with it is that it's a FTP gacha model game. 

Now, I love me some gacha mechanics from time to time, but I hate when games demand I pay a lot of attention to them every day. And that's my problem right now with Morimens: I don't want to play it every day, because it's a Slay the Spire-like game. I really, really like the mechanics in Morimens like the different characters' kits and the different realms (characters fall into 1 of 4 "classes") and the passives and character ultimates and I could go on. If BIAV Studio could just make an offline version of this like the Megaman gacha game did, that would be amazing. But I don't think that will happen, sadly.  

Either way, I'm recommending this because my problem is mostly unique to me and the core gameplay is still fun. As for the story, I usually don't give a ♥♥♥♥ about gacha game stories and this was no different; I watched a little of it and it was pretty generic.

items.summary:
Ein bisschen aufwendig zum Laufen zu bewegen, da das Programm zunächst in Japanisch startet und Updates geladen werden müssen. Sobald man aber in den Einstellungen auf English schaltet, bekommt man ein wunderbar düsteres 
 Kartenspiel präsentiert.
